case_title: YONG LIN CHEN VS. RYAN ARTHUR QUAN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY CHEN, YONG LIN AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, RYAN ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, YONG LIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT QUAN, RYAN ARTHUR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
